content_of_post_to_answer: Does despair usually feel heavy or does it feel empty?
answer: Despair isn’t one texture. Sometimes it feels heavy when the mind is still generating meaning, so everything becomes weight. Other times it feels empty when the system stops generating meaning at all, like emotional shutdown. The difference isn’t intensity but whether anything inside is still ‘working’ to register it. Heavy despair still has sensation; empty despair is what remains when even sensation goes quiet.
